rationale: Both papers are in price-promotion/coupon research (citing note: token redemption effort in discounts; cited note: unexpected in-store coupons and basket effects), so a non-incidental conceptual link is plausible. However, their focal mechanisms and outcomes differ, and the raw match evidence is only a DOI entry with no in-text citation context. This is not safe to drop, but the current evidence is not strong enough to clearly keep.
